festivals.name: Lohri
festivals.description: Harvest festival with bonfires, folk songs, and dance, marking the end of winter.

greetingMessages.casual: Happy Lohri! Fire and music time.
greetingMessages.family: Wishing you a warm and joyful Lohri celebration.

culturalTips: Share a bonfire photo with family and friends.
Talk about seasonal foods and local traditions.
Celebrate with music and dance moments.

festivals.name: Makar Sankranti
festivals.description: Harvest festival marking the Sun's transition into Capricorn, often celebrated with kite flying and festive sweets.

greetingMessages.casual: Happy Makar Sankranti! Enjoy the kite skies.
greetingMessages.family: Wishing your day is filled with sweetness and sunshine.

culturalTips: Share a kite-flying photo.
Discuss festival foods and family recipes.
Mention harvest traditions in your region.

festivals.name: Pongal
festivals.description: Tamil harvest festival honoring gratitude, nature, and community.

greetingMessages.family: May this Pongal bring joy, abundance, and peace.

culturalTips: Share a photo of a festive meal.
Talk about home decorations and rangoli.
Celebrate with traditional food stories.

festivals.name: Republic Day
festivals.description: Commemorates the adoption of the Indian Constitution in 1950.

greetingMessages.casual: Happy Republic Day! Proud and grateful.
greetingMessages.family: Wishing you a meaningful and proud Republic Day.

culturalTips: Share moments from local celebrations.
Discuss values of democracy and citizenship.

festivals.name: Vasant Panchami
festivals.description: Festival celebrating spring, learning, and cultural renewal.

greetingMessages.family: Wishing your home a bright and peaceful spring season.

culturalTips: Share spring-themed photos.
Discuss learning goals and creative activities.

festivals.name: Maha Shivratri
festivals.description: A spiritual observance dedicated to Lord Shiva.

greetingMessages.casual: Happy Maha Shivratri! Wishing you strength and calm.
greetingMessages.family: May this day bring peace, reflection, and blessings.

culturalTips: Share a respectful temple or prayer moment.
Discuss meaningful spiritual practices.

festivals.name: Holi
festivals.description: Festival of colors symbolizing joy, renewal, and the victory of good over evil.

greetingMessages.casual: Happy Holi! Have a colorful day.
greetingMessages.family: Wishing your family a joyful and vibrant Holi.

culturalTips: Share colorful celebration photos.
Talk about favorite festival sweets.
Celebrate with music and community.

festivals.name: Ram Navami
festivals.description: Celebrates the birth anniversary of Lord Rama.

greetingMessages.casual: Happy Ram Navami! Wishing you peace.
greetingMessages.family: May this day bring harmony and blessings to your family.

culturalTips: Share meaningful prayer moments.
Discuss values from traditional stories.

festivals.name: Ugadi
festivals.description: New Year festival celebrated with gratitude and fresh beginnings.

greetingMessages.casual: Happy Ugadi! New year, new hope.
greetingMessages.family: Wishing your family a joyful and prosperous new year.

culturalTips: Share photos of New Year traditions.
Talk about seasonal dishes and family customs.

festivals.name: Gudi Padwa

greetingMessages.casual: Happy Gudi Padwa! Wishing you happiness.
greetingMessages.family: May the new year bring positivity and success.

culturalTips: Share photos of home decorations.
Discuss festive food and family rituals.

festivals.name: Cheti Chand
festivals.description: Sindhi New Year celebration honoring community and tradition.

greetingMessages.casual: Happy Cheti Chand! Wishing you joy.
greetingMessages.family: May this day bring peace and prosperity to your home.

culturalTips: Share traditional celebration moments.
Discuss music, stories, and family customs.

festivals.name: Eid-ul-Fitr
festivals.description: Festival marking the end of Ramadan with prayers, gratitude, and shared meals.

greetingMessages.casual: Eid Mubarak! Wishing you joy and peace.
greetingMessages.family: May your Eid be filled with warmth, kindness, and celebration.

culturalTips: Share a celebration photo respectfully.
Talk about meaningful family traditions.
Celebrate generosity and community connection.

festivals.name: Eid-ul-Adha
festivals.description: Festival honoring sacrifice, compassion, and faith.

greetingMessages.family: May this Eid bring peace, gratitude, and togetherness.

culturalTips: Share a respectful family gathering moment.
Discuss values of generosity and compassion.

festivals.name: Muharram
festivals.description: A period of remembrance, reflection, and spiritual significance.

greetingMessages.casual: Peace and reflection to you in Muharram.
greetingMessages.family: May this time bring remembrance, dignity, and calm.

culturalTips: Share reflective and respectful messages.
Discuss values of compassion and remembrance.

festivals.name: Milad-un-Nabi
festivals.description: Commemorates the birth anniversary of Prophet Muhammad.

greetingMessages.family: May this day bring blessings, gratitude, and unity.

culturalTips: Share thoughtful community messages.
Talk about kindness and service values.

festivals.name: Gurpurab (Guru Nanak Jayanti)
festivals.description: Celebrates the birth anniversary of Guru Nanak Dev Ji.

greetingMessages.family: May this Gurpurab bring peace, humility, and joy.

culturalTips: Share moments of service and gratitude.
Discuss teachings that inspire daily life.

festivals.name: Christmas
festivals.description: Celebrates the birth of Jesus Christ with prayers, gifts, and family gatherings.

greetingMessages.casual: Merry Christmas! Wishing you warmth and joy.
greetingMessages.family: May your home be filled with peace and festive happiness.

culturalTips: Share festive decoration photos.
Celebrate with music and gratitude.
Discuss traditions that bring family together.
